channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kiamba MP and Vipingo Industries Deny Links to Ol Kalou By-Election Violence
item.description: Kiambaa MP John Njuguna Wanjiku and Vipingo Industries Limited have both denied any involvement in the violence during the Ol Kalou by-election chaos. The MP admitted being present at the scene but st...

item.title: England and France clash in thrilling World Cup third-place playoff with Saka's hat-trick and Mbappé's historic goals
item.description: In a stunning FIFA World Cup third-place playoff at Miami Stadium, England secured their best finish since 1966 with a 6-4 victory over France. Bukayo Saka delivered a masterclass with a breathtaking ...

item.title: Andrew and Tristan Tate Arrested in US on Rape and Sex Trafficking Charges, Face Extradition to UK
item.description: Australian English summary: The United Kingdom is seeking the extradition of Andrew and Tristan Tate from the United States following new rape and sex trafficking charges. The brothers, known for thei...

item.title: Pax Silica: Balancing Progress with Environmental Responsibility in the Philippines
item.description: The article discusses the potential benefits and challenges of the Philippines joining Pax Silica, a US-led alliance aiming to secure supply chains for AI, semiconductors, and critical minerals. While...

item.title: Antidepressant Shows Promise in Alleviating Long COVID Fatigue
item.description: A global clinical trial led by McMaster University and international collaborators found that fluvoxamine, a low-cost antidepressant, significantly reduces fatigue and improves quality of life in adul...

item.title: NCOP chair faces backlash for unapproved Russia trip with high-cost delegation
item.description: Refilwe Mtshweni-Tsipane, chair of the National Council of Provinces (NCOP), has sparked controversy after embarking on an unapproved trip to Moscow with eight officials and five MPs. The journey, whi...

item.title: Food waste in UK cities: Families lose hundreds annually on uneaten food
item.description: A survey commissioned by Bernard Matthews has identified food waste hotspots across the UK, revealing that families in Glasgow, Liverpool, and Nottingham waste over £300 annually on uneaten food. The ...

item.title: Chelsea Set to Sign England Midfielder Morgan Rogers from Aston Villa
item.description: Chelsea Football Club have reached an agreement to sign England World Cup midfielder Morgan Rogers from Aston Villa, according to recent reports. The transfer, valued at £117 million, will see Rogers ...

item.title: Tanzania High Court Upholds Justice Lila Commission's Legality
item.description: The Tanzania High Court has ruled to uphold the legality of the Presidential Commission of Inquiry into Criminal Acts Connected with the Violence during and after the 2025 General Election, dismissing...

item.title: Troy Jackson Seeks Senate Nomination in Maine Democratic Primary Against Susan Collins
item.description: Troy Jackson, a former ally of Graham Platner, has built a significant lead in the Maine Democratic primary race to replace Platner and challenge Republican Sen. Susan Collins. With 300 of 319 delegat...

item.title: Argentina's Polarizing Football Identity and Global Rivalries in the FIFA World Cup
item.description: The article explores Argentina's complex football identity shaped by legends like Diego Maradona and Lionel Messi, which has made the nation a polarizing force in international football. Argentina's h...

item.title: Technical access issue prevents article display
item.description: The article encountered an error preventing display, indicating the user may be blocked as a crawler bot. News Corp Australia uses software to manage crawler traffic. Readers experiencing this issue s...

item.title: Spain and Argentina Clash in 2026 FIFA World Cup Final
item.description: Spain and Argentina are set to face off in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final on Sunday, with both teams aiming for historic victories. Spain seeks their second men's title after winning Euro 2024, while A...

item.title: Rivers Senator Urges Youth to Embrace Skills for National Development
item.description: Senator Ipalibo Harry Banigo, representing Rivers West, addressed 140 youths who recently completed training in lithium-ion-based street light installation and maintenance. The senator emphasized that...

item.title: B.C. Wildfires Surge Past 100 as Lightning Sparks Intense Fire Season
item.description: British Columbia is experiencing an unprecedented wildfire crisis, with the number of active fires surpassing 100 due to a surge in lightning strikes. The BC Wildfire Service reports that over 4,000 l...

item.title: Pakistan's Finance Minister Engages US on Trade Negotiations and Tariff Reductions
item.description: Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb has arrived in Washington for a three-day visit aimed at advancing bilateral economic ties with the United States. During his trip, he will engage with U.S. officia...

item.title: Skyroot's Vikram-1 successfully completes India's first private orbital launch, marking a major milestone for the country's commercial space sector
item.description: India achieved a significant milestone in its space programme after Skyroot Aerospace successfully completed the maiden orbital flight of its privately developed Vikram-1 rocket from the Satish Dhawan...

item.title: Cape Town tackles fake license plates linked to organized crime
item.description: Cape Town authorities are intensifying efforts to combat luxury vehicles with fraudulent registration plates linked to organized crime. Recent arrests, including Nigerian nationals driving a Mercedes-...

item.title: Winners and losers of the 2026 World Cup: A balanced assessment of triumphs and challenges
item.description: The article examines the multifaceted outcomes of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, highlighting both successes and challenges across sports, politics, and infrastructure. Host nations like Canada, the U.S., a...

item.title: SpaceX Open-Sources Grok Build Tool After Privacy Concerns and Data Retention Revisions
item.description: SpaceX has open-sourced its Grok Build CLI tool following significant privacy concerns and data retention adjustments. Initially, the AI tool faced criticism for uploading users' entire repositories t...
